name: Task History & Analytics
description: Persists and loads task history, active queue state, and stored tasks. Tracks task groups, computes per-project activity statistics, and surfaces them through the activity dashboard.

Managers/ActivityDashboardManager.cs.content:
class ActivityDashboardManager
  MarkDirty() -> void
  RefreshIfNeeded(ScrollViewer container, string? currentProjectPath = null) -> void
  RefreshContent(ScrollViewer container, string? currentProjectPath = null) -> void
  ComputeStats(string? currentProjectPath = null) -> List<ProjectActivityStats>
  BuildDashboardContent(bool isDialog, string? currentProjectPath = null) -> StackPanel

Managers/HistoryManager.cs.content:
class HistoryManager
  SaveHistory(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> historyTasks) -> void
  LoadHistoryAsync(int retentionHours) -> Task<List<AgentTask>>
  SaveActiveQueue(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> activeTasks, object activeTasksLock, bool useBackgroundWrite = false) -> void
  LoadActiveQueueAsync() -> Task<List<AgentTask>>
  ClearActiveQueue() -> void
  SaveStoredTasks(ObservableCollection<AgentTask> storedTasks) -> void
  LoadStoredTasksAsync() -> Task<List<AgentTask>>

Managers/TaskGroupTracker.cs.content:
class TaskGroupState
  GroupId: string
  GroupName: string
  StartTime: DateTime
  TotalCount: int
  CompletedCount: int
  FailedCount: int
class TaskGroupEntry
  TaskId: string
  TaskNumber: int
  Description: string
  Status: AgentTaskStatus
  StartTime: DateTime
  EndTime: DateTime?
  CompletionSummary: string
  Recommendations: string
  InputTokens: long
  OutputTokens: long
class GroupCompletedEventArgs
  GroupState: TaskGroupState

dependencies: AgentTask model for status and token data
